caption: Table 130. Document revision history
rows: Added reference to errata sheet ES0392 in Section 1: Introduction. Figure 1: STM32H750xB block diagram: changed APB1 and APB2 maximum frequency to 120 MHZ, and WKUP[5:0] to WKUP[6:1]. Updated Figure 5: STM32H745xI/G bus matrix. Modified Section 3.5.1: Power supply scheme Modified note on Section 3.5.3: Voltage regulator (SMPS step-down converter and LDO) Updated Section 3.24: Digital camera interface (DCMI) (modified supported format) Updated Section 3.27: True random number generator (RNG). Added Full-duplex mode in Section 3.33: Serial peripheral interfaces (SPI)/integrated interchip sound interfaces (I2S). Updated number of microphones that can be supported by the SAI in Section 3.34: Serial audio interfaces (SAI). Table 8: STM32H750xB pin/ball definition: – Removed FDCAN1_RXFD_MODE, FDCAN1_TXFD_MODE, FDCAN2_RXFD_MODE and FDCAN2_TXFD_MODE functions from and all alternate function tables. – Added note to VDD50USB. – Added note to PB12 and PB13. – Change PB1 I/O structure to TT_A. – For TFBGA24+25, extra VDD signals replaced by '-'. Changed pin 48 from NC to VDD in Figure 7: LQFP176 pinout. Updated Figure 13: Power supply scheme. Updated Section 6.2: Absolute maximum ratings introduction to device mission profile. Updated Table 11: Current characteristics Changed f to 100 MHz in Table 13: General operating conditions. CPU2 Replaced Min V by Min V in Table 14: Supply voltage and maximum DD DDLDO frequency configuration. Removed note 1 from Table 33: Typical and maximum current consumption in Stop, LDO regulator ON and Table 35: Typical and maximum current consumption in Sleep mode, LDO regulator ON. Updated section I/O dynamic current consumption and I/O static current consumption. Updated Table 41: High-speed external user clock characteristics. In Table 52: Flash memory programming: removed reference to single bank configuration in title and added t typical and maximum values. ERASE128KB Modified Table 55: EMI characteristics for fHSE = 8 MHz and fCPU = 400 MHz Changed I to I in Table 59: I/O static characteristics leak lkg Added reference to AN4899 in Section 6.3.16: I/O port characteristics. Changed capacitance value for speed 10 and t/t, and speed for 11 and t/t/F Table 63: r f r f max Output timing characteristics (HSLV ON).

Updated t /t and t t in Table 73: su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT-CLKH) Synchronous multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Changed t to (NWAIT-CLKH) t and updated t /t and t t su(NWAIT-CLKH) su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT- in Table 75: Synchronous non-multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Updated CLKH) t and t in Table 79: SDRAM read timings and Table 80: su(SDCLKH _Data) h(SDCLKH _Data) LPSDR SDRAM read timings. Replaced FMC_CLK by FMC_SDCLK in Section : SDRAM waveforms and timings. Updated t and t in Table 83: QUADSPI characteristics in SDR mode and s(IN) h(IN) t /t and t /t in Table 84: QUADSPI characteristics in DDR mode. sr(IN) sf(IN) hr(IN) hf(IN) Updated Figure 40: ADC accuracy characteristics and specified that it is an example for 12-bit resolution. and Figure 41: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function. Added reference to AN5354 application note in note of Table 86: ADC characteristics. Changed V maximum value to V -0.2 in Table 90: DAC accuracy. DAC_OUT REF+ Updated T maximum value in Table 92: Temperature sensor characteristics. L Changed temperature condition to 130 °C for TS_CAL2 in Table 93: Temperature sensor calibration values. Updated DuCy in Table 100: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V. CKOUT Updated Figure 49: USART timing diagram in SPI master mode and Figure 50: USART timing diagram in SPI slave mode. Updated t and t in Table 107: SPI dynamic characteristics. su(MI) h(MI) Added Section : USB OTG_FS characteristics. Updated Table 114: Dynamics characteristics: USB ULPI Updated t t , t , t and t in Table 111: Dynamics characteristics: SD / ISU, IH ISUD IHD OH MMC characteristics, VDD = 2.7 to 3.6 V Updated t t and V max value in Table 13: General operating conditions in ISU, IH CORE Table 112: Dynamics characteristics: eMMC characteristics VDD = 1.71V to 1.9V. Added Section 7.1: Device marking (device marking information removed from package sections and moved to this section) Updated Section 7.5: LQFP144 package information (1A), Section 7.8: LQFP176 package information (1T), Section 7.9: LQFP208 package information, Section 7.10: UFBGA(176+25) package information (A0E7), Section 7.12: TFBGA240+25 package information. Modified title for footprint figures and PCB design rules tables (examples instead of recommendations) in Section 7: Package information Added note related to the availability of tape and reel packing and updated information on pin count in Section 8: Ordering information. Added Section 9: Important security notice.

In the context of I2C, replaced master and slave by controller and target, respectively. Updated features on cover page. Updated Table 2: STM32H745xI/G features and peripheral counts. Updated Figure 1: STM32H745xI/G block diagram. Updated Section 3.4: Boot modes. Updated Table 7: Legend/abbreviations used in the pinout table. Updated Table 8: STM32H745xI/G pin/ball definition. Updated Table 9: Alternate functions. Updated Figure 13: Power supply scheme. Updated Table 13: General operating conditions.

Updated Table 15: VCAP operating conditions. Updated Figure 16: External components for SMPS step-down converter. Updated Table 39: Peripheral current consumption in Run mode. Updated Section : Low-speed external user clock generated from an external source. Updated Figure 23: Typical application with an 8 MHz crystal. Updated Table 59: I/O static characteristics. Updated Figure 40: ADC accuracy characteristics. Updated Table 86: ADC characteristics. Updated Table 92: Temperature sensor characteristics. Updated Table 93: Temperature sensor calibration values. Updated Section : I2C interface characteristics. Updated Table 120: LQFP144 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 121: LQFP176 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 122: LQFP208 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 128: TFBGA240+25 - Example of PCB design rules.
